---
name: Skill Request
about: Propose a new skill for the library
title: "[SKILL REQUEST] skill-name-here"
labels: skill-request
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Name
What would you call this skill? Use a short, descriptive name (e.g. "pitch-treatment-writer", "hook-generator").

## Media Format
Which category does this skill belong to?
- [ ] TV Documentary
- [ ] Magazine Journalism
- [ ] YouTube
- [ ] Podcast
- [ ] Image Prompting

What production stage? (e.g. pre-production, scripting, post-production)

## What Problem Does This Solve?
Describe the specific production task this skill would handle. Be as concrete as possible. What do you currently have to do manually or with multiple prompts that this skill would streamline?

## Example Input
What would you give Claude to work with? Paste a realistic example — a paragraph of notes, a brief, a transcript excerpt, etc. The more real this is, the better we can evaluate the skill.

## What The Output Should Look Like
Describe the ideal output, or paste an example of what you'd hope to receive. Length, format, tone — whatever matters for your use case.

## How Often Would You Use This?
- [ ] Every project
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] Occasionally
- [ ] One-off need

## Anything Else?
Any edge cases, limitations, or related skills you're aware of?
